word: H6231 - עָשַׁק - ʻâshaq - aw-shak' - Get deceitfully

sections.paragraph:
Original: עשׁק

Transliteration: ‛âshaq

Phonetic: aw-shak'

BDB Definition:

  1. to press upon, oppress, violate, defraud, do violence, get deceitfully, wrong, extort
    1. (Qal)
      1. to oppress, wrong, extort
      2. to oppress
    2. (Pual) to be exploited, be crushed

Origin: a primitive root (comp. H6229)

TWOT entry: 1713

Part(s) of speech: Verb
